content.full_text:
March 5, 2004

Carrie McKinley
Tracy Pillows
McKinley & Pillows
921 11th Street, Suite 804
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-097

Dear Ms. McKinley & Ms. Pillows:

In examining our file on this matter, I note that we have not received the additional information requested to process your letter. In light of the significant time which has elapsed since our request, and the fact that the reporting period has passed, we consider this letter withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Counsel, Legal Division
